summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in designing scalable backend systems and developing machine learning pipelines. Adept at leveraging modern cloud infrastructure to reduce costs and improve system latency. Proven track record of spearheading high-impact projects from conception to production in fast-paced environments.

bullet_points: Architected and deployed a microservices-based recommendation engine, serving over 2M daily active users with 99.9% uptime.
Optimized legacy SQL database queries, reducing average API response times by 45% and saving $1,200 monthly in compute costs.
Mentored 3 junior developers and established automated CI/CD pipelines, increasing deployment frequency by 3x.
Built automated ETL pipelines using Python and Apache Airflow to process 500GB of daily user event data.
Developed interactive Tableau dashboards used by executive leadership, driving a 15% increase in actionable insights.
Implemented real-time data streaming with Kafka, cutting data processing latency from 4 hours to under 2 minutes.

projects.name: AI-Powered Threat Detection
bullet_points: Engineered a deep learning model to identify network anomalies, achieving a 94% accuracy rate on real-time traffic.
Designed a responsive React dashboard for security analysts to monitor threats, reducing incident response time by 30%.
Scaled the inference engine using Docker and AWS Lambda to handle bursts of up to 10,000 requests per minute.
Published findings at a regional tech conference, receiving the 'Best Student Innovation' award.

projects.name: E-Commerce Optimization Engine
bullet_points: Developed a custom cart abandonment recovery system, resulting in a 12% increase in monthly recovered revenue.
Integrated Stripe API for seamless international payments, expanding customer reach to 5 new countries.
Implemented Redis caching for product catalog, improving page load speeds by 60% during peak holiday traffic.
Automated inventory tracking alerts, cutting stock-out incidents by 25% over a 6-month period.
